_readme: The 4 conversational forms for persona BrightPath. Shape follows the real config convention (form_id/title/description/program/enabled/trigger_phrases/fields/introduction) and the field types the Config Builder supports. Field ids follow the live `field_{epoch_ms}` convention; the values here are fixed identifiers, not timestamps to interpret.
_validation_note: Real configs carry no per-field `validation` object — validation is implied by `type` + `required`.
_pii_note: Every field below collects personal data. Per CLAUDE.md's Living-Inventory PR Rule, the demo tenant must be added to docs/roadmap/PII-Project/pii-inventory.md when it is created (P1/P4). Synthetic data lowers stakes but does not remove the surface.

volunteer_application.title: Volunteer Application
volunteer_application.description: General volunteer interest for Bright Futures and event support.
trigger_phrases: How do I sign up to volunteer
volunteer_application.introduction: Wonderful — takes a few minutes, and Dana follows up personally within a day or two.

fields.label: How did you hear about us
fields.prompt: First — how did you hear about BrightPath?

fields.label: Full name
fields.prompt: What's your full name?

fields.label: Date of birth
fields.prompt: What's your date of birth?

fields.label: Email address
fields.prompt: What's the best email to reach you at?

fields.label: Primary phone
fields.prompt: And a phone number, in case email gets buried?

fields.label: Text message consent
fields.prompt: Is it okay if we text you about next steps?

fields.label: Home address
fields.prompt: What's your home address? (helps us match you to a nearby family)

fields.label: Reliable transportation
fields.prompt: Do you have reliable transportation?

fields.label: Preferred language
fields.prompt: What language are you most comfortable in?

fields.label: Ways you'd like to serve
fields.prompt: Which way would you feel most comfortable serving a family?

fields.label: What motivates you to volunteer
fields.prompt: What's drawing you to support a family in foster care?

fields.label: References
fields.prompt: Please share two references (name and how we can reach them).

fields.label: Background check consent
fields.prompt: Everyone who works with youth completes a background check and fingerprinting. Are you comfortable with that?

fields.label: Anything else we should know
fields.prompt: Anything you'd like the team to know before they reach out?

mentor_application.title: Mentor Application
mentor_application.description: Application for the Mentorship Matches program — a twelve-month commitment.
trigger_phrases: I want to be a mentor
How do I become a mentor
mentor_application.introduction: Mentoring is a year-long commitment, so this one asks a bit more. Marcus reviews every application himself.

fields.label: Applicant name
fields.prompt: What's your full name?

fields.label: Email
fields.prompt: Best email for you?

fields.label: Phone
fields.prompt: And a phone number?

fields.label: Home address
fields.prompt: What's your home address? (helps us match you nearby)

fields.label: Twelve-month commitment
fields.prompt: Mentorship Matches asks for a minimum of twelve months. Can you commit to that?

fields.label: Age group preference
fields.prompt: Any age group you'd feel most at home with?

fields.label: Why mentoring
fields.prompt: What's drawing you to mentoring right now?

fields.label: References
fields.prompt: Please share two references (name and how we can reach them).

fields.label: Background check consent
fields.prompt: Every mentor completes a background check before being matched. Are you comfortable with that?
fields._note: Consent capture only. Picasso must NEVER evaluate, summarize, or act on background-check RESULTS — see CLAUDE.md 'Background Check Caution'. Nothing downstream reads this beyond storing the yes/no.

donation_inquiry.title: Donation Inquiry
donation_inquiry.description: For givers with a question — recurring gifts, employer matching, designating a program.
trigger_phrases: I have a question about donating
donation_inquiry.introduction: Happy to help — Priya handles giving questions and is quick to reply.

fields.label: Contact name
fields.prompt: What's your name?

fields.label: Email
fields.prompt: Where should Priya reply?

fields.label: What it's about
fields.prompt: What's your question about?

options.label: Designating a gift to a program

fields.label: Your question
fields.prompt: What would you like to know?

event_registration.title: Gala Registration
event_registration.description: Registration for the annual Rivermont gala.
trigger_phrases: I want to attend the event
event_registration.introduction: The gala is BrightPath's one big night a year. Let's get you on the list.

fields.label: Guest name
fields.prompt: What name should be on the list?

fields.label: Email
fields.prompt: Where should we send your confirmation?

fields.label: Number attending
fields.prompt: How many seats do you need?

fields.label: Dietary needs
fields.prompt: Any dietary needs we should pass to the caterer?

fields.label: Sponsorship interest
fields.prompt: Would you like Priya to send the sponsorship options?
